title: Including a CC when sending emails through an automation
excerpt:
Hey monday.com Team, 
I would like to request that when setting up an email using an automation that you will be able to add in a CC email address in the email. 
Thanks, 
Ryno

posts.author: Ryno (Ryno Harmse)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday.com Team,

I would like to request that when setting up an email using an automation that you will be able to add in a CC email address in the email.

Thanks,
Ryno

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ryan,
In your automation setup you could define multiple email addresses in a text column separated by " ; ". The integration will then send emails to each of those addresses individually.
Cheers,
Harsh
